title: Fiserv Inc. (FI) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value estimate for Fiserv Inc. (FI) using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model based on the latest free cash flow (4.299000e+09) and price (57.02000045776367).

revenueGrowth.rationale: Assumes Fiserv sustains a mid-single-digit free cash flow growth rate over the projection period, driven by its high-retention core processing operations and strong merchant acquiring growth (e.g., Clover).

terminalGrowthRate.rationale: Assumes long-term economic expansion and inflation-linked pricing power typical for an entrenched payments infrastructure provider.

discountRate.rationale: Uses a slightly higher cost of equity to account for regulatory risks, competitive pressures from agile fintechs, and macroeconomic cyclicality in the merchant segment.
